metadata.title: Certified.
_variant_todo: rewrite every beat narration_text in the Teardown register (voices/teardown/VOICE.md + CLAUDE-BRAND.md) — voice only, facts unchanged
signature tangent 0-1 per video, ONLY on a clear opportunity (see SKILL)

beats.narration_text: this is Liam, in for Bear. People are selling Claude certifications online right now. They're all scams. Anthropic doesn't endorse a single one. There are exactly three real Claude certificates you can put on LinkedIn today — all free, all issued by Anthropic. All three can be completed in roughly six hours. Here's exactly how.

props.command: how do I get a real Claude certification for free and put it on LinkedIn?

beats.narration_text: Three certificates. All at anthropic.skilljar.com — sign up free, no Claude subscription required. Certificate one: Claude 101. Thirteen lessons, five modules, about one hour. What Claude actually is, Chat versus Cowork versus Code, Projects, Skills, Connectors. Certificate two: AI Fluency — Framework and Foundations. Three hours. The best of the three. Certificate three: Introduction to Claude Cowork. Two hours. The best feature of Claude, end to end.

props.artifactTitle: Three real Claude certifications — all free
artifactLines: Claude 101 → 1 hour. Chat, Cowork, Code, Projects, Skills, Connectors.
AI Fluency: Framework & Foundations → 3 hours. Best of the three. Start here.
Introduction to Claude Cowork → 2 hours. The best Claude feature, end to end.

beats.narration_text: If you only have time for one, In practice, AI Fluency. It's the closest thing to taste training you'll find for free. Thirteen lessons on how to actually engage with AI — not just use it. The Four D's: Delegation, Description, Discernment, Diligence. Effective prompting. Critical thinking around outputs. Ethics. There's a vocabulary cheat sheet inside. Download it and re-read it more than the lessons.

shot.slotNote: SLOT — fill media/B02.png (screenshot: anthropic.skilljar.com/ai-fluency-framework-foundations course page, or the vocabulary cheat sheet)

beats.narration_text: The steps are the same for all three. Go to anthropic.skilljar.com. Create a free account with your email. Navigate to the course URL. Complete it in one sitting if you can — each module ends with a short quiz. When you finish, Anthropic issues your certificate. You download it, it has your name, the course title, and the Anthropic logo. That's the one you put on LinkedIn.

shot.slotNote: SLOT — fill media/B03.png (screenshot: Anthropic Academy completion page showing a certificate download, with the Anthropic logo visible)

beats.narration_text: How to add it to LinkedIn: go to your profile, click Add section, then Licenses and certifications. Name: Claude 101 — Anthropic Academy. Issuing organization: Anthropic. Issue date: today. Repeat for each of the three. The same certificate can be added it for a team member the same day. The signal is small but specific: fewer than two percent of the world has tried Claude Pro. A certificate tells anyone who checks that you've actually touched the tool.

props.title: linkedin-cert-format.md
props.code:
LinkedIn → Add section
→ Licenses & certifications Name: Claude 101 — Anthropic Academy
Issuing organization: Anthropic
Issue date: [today] Repeat for:
- AI Fluency: Framework & Foundations
- Introduction to Claude Cowork

beats.narration_text: Stanford's 2025 AI Index: seventy-eight percent of organizations used AI in 2024, up from fifty-five percent the year before. PwC found workers with AI skills earn a fifty-six percent wage premium on average — up from twenty-five percent the year before. The certificate doesn't replace skill. But it signals that you've already started, at a moment when most haven't. That signal is worth more than it looks.

artifactLines: 78% of orgs used AI in 2024. Up from 55% a year earlier.
AI-skilled workers earn 56% wage premium on average (PwC 2025).
Less than 2% of the world has tried Claude Pro.
Certificate = proof you started before most people did.

beats.narration_text: Your turn. Block one hour this week. Start with AI Fluency — the best one. Come back for Claude 101 and Introduction to Cowork after. Paste this into Claude once you've finished to lock in what you learned.

props.command: I just completed the Anthropic AI Fluency certification. The key concepts were: Delegation, Description, Discernment, Diligence. Help me apply the 4D framework to my actual job: [describe your role]. Give me one concrete example per D, using my real work.
props.runningText: paste this into Claude after your cert…

beats.narration_text: Three real certs. Six hours. Free. anthropic.skilljar.com. Nik Bear Brown.

props.title: Certified.
props.subline: Three free certs, real Anthropic signal
